evidenceSnippetOriginal: Please visit the linked page for most up to date tools, a subset of which is listed below: Microsoft Copilot & M365 Copilot Google Gemini (and Gemini for Workspace) OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise Google Notebook LM AWS Bedrock models (Amazon Q, PartyRock, Claude, LLaMA, etc.) Zoom AI Companion (Education license)
rightsNote: Official source retains original rights. Tracker metadata is open licensed; source text is quoted only as short evidence.

evidenceSnippetDisplay: UCLA DTS says its linked tools page has the most up-to-date tool list and lists a subset including Copilot, Gemini, ChatGPT Enterprise, Notebook LM, AWS Bedrock models, and Zoom AI Companion.
